Off Calendar Nov-28-2016 Dismissal

Off Calendar Nov-08-2016 Continued To Nov-28-16 At 11:15 A.M. In Dept 503

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-27-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Matthew M. Schroeder of ADAMS, NYE, BECHT LLP (415-982-8955), appearing for defendant / moving party Amcord Inc.

RULING:
DEFENDANT AMCORD INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Amcord, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Matter not reported (503/GLW)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-06-2016 Continued To Oct-27-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Matthew M. Schroeder of ADAMS, NYE, BECHT LLP (415-982-8955), appearing for defendant / moving party Amcord, Inc.
Tiffany Viveros of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), specially appearing for plaintiff Robin Paulson

RULING:
DEFENDANT AMCORD INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

Pursuant to counsel for plaintiff's request and no objection made by defendant's counsel, the Court vacated its tentative ruling and continued defendant Amcord, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment to October 27, 2016 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 503. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Reporter: Sandy Lee of AIKEN WELCH, CSR 971 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/GLW)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel- Civil
Off Calendar Sep-29-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Kimberly J. Chu of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for moving party Nancy T. Williams, Brayton Purcell LLP

RULING:
NANCY T. WILLIAMS, BRAYTON PURCELL LLP'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF ROBIN PAULSON

No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Nancy T. Williams', Brayton Purcell LLP, motion to be relieved as counsel for plaintiff Robin Paulson is granted. Counsel demonstrated she provided Ms. Paulson with proper notice of the motion and no opposition was filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Matter not reported (503/GLW)
